_note: Updated daily at noon by the orchestrator. Synthesised from all agent statuses. Plain language — no jargon.

priorities.title: Ship the room editor milestone — rebuilt inspector, obvious place vs select, keyboard and focus on new panels
priorities.note: One release slice: engineering rebuilds the inspector and entity model; design makes place vs select unmistakable and finishes keyboard order and visible focus on new panels.
priorities.proposed_solution: Coordinate a single milestone so structure, mode clarity, and baseline accessibility land together.

priorities.title: Room save contract — version field and migration, then automated save/load round-trip
priorities.note: Founder sign-off on versioning before more format churn. QA lands the round-trip test once the on-disk contract is stable.
priorities.proposed_solution: Approve versioning, ship the field and migration notes, then add the automated save/load test as the production safety net.

priorities.title: Copilot readiness program — bar, prompt and model evaluation, tests, and security gate
priorities.note: Founder and engineering define measurable commercial criteria. Level design owns room quality standards and prompt iteration. Engineering runs a time-boxed newer-model benchmark after the founder sets schedule and switch criteria. QA automates generate, accept, verify. Cybersecurity runs prompt injection before public exposure.
priorities.proposed_solution: Treat this as one program with one founder decision frame on bar, timing, and what good enough to switch means.

priorities.title: Finish wiring the AI image generator into the sprite editor
priorities.note: Server side is working; in-editor generation and workflow integration are still in progress. Design rules for AI panels support visual consistency.
priorities.proposed_solution: Complete the in-editor UI and apply path; keep panels aligned with documented animation and AI panel rules.

priorities.title: Document animation and AI panel rules so all tools stay consistent
priorities.note: Canonical rules in STYLE_GUIDE.md or a linked spec so new UI does not drift.
priorities.proposed_solution: Land the doc, route review, and point engineering at the same reference.

priorities.title: Business plan: founder sets ninety-day goals and stop rules for side experiments
priorities.note: From the initial business plan (Apr 2026). Keep portfolio experiments small (about two to four at a time) until written goals and kill criteria exist.
priorities.proposed_solution: Founder writes 90-day outcomes and stop rules for experiments; orchestrator tracks them in the weekly digest.

risks_p1.title: Saved room files have no version number yet
risks_p1.note: Format changes can still break old saves until versioning ships; round-trip test follows the contract.

risks_p1.title: Copilot readiness is split across several teams
risks_p1.note: If the program is not tracked as one slice, commercial bar, model timing, and tests can drift.

founder_decisions.title: Sign off on room file versioning and migration approach
founder_decisions.note: Unblocks the room save contract and the automated save/load test.

founder_decisions.title: Copilot program — commercial bar, when to benchmark the newer model, and model switch criteria
founder_decisions.note: Answer once so paid tier planning, engineering benchmark, and switch threshold stay aligned.

actions.name: Action Item Audit
actions.description: Sweep all agent status files for overdue or stale priorities and surface them in the Monday digest.
actions.trigger: Monday morning, as part of weekly-review compilation

actions.name: Specialist Consult
actions.description: Progressive specialist invocation (ReAct pattern) — invoke the most likely resolver first, expand only if unresolved.
actions.trigger: Any multi-domain question that can be resolved by one or two specialists
